card.title: Relay mode
card.description: Going away? Generate a handover pack: instructions, medications, schedule for the period, contacts and the "Who I am" page, shared with the relief caregiver through a simple link.
card.deleteConfirm: Delete this pack? Its link will stop working.
card.instructionsPlaceholder: The keys are at the neighbour's, the physio comes on Tuesdays, call Sophie if in doubt...
card.created: Pack created. Send the link below to the relief caregiver.
card.expiryNote: The content is frozen at creation time. The link stays readable up to 7 days after the relay ends.
card.datesRequired: Please set the start and end dates.
card.datesOrder: The end must be after the start.

errors.load: Could not load the relay packs.

page.title: Relay from {{start}} to {{end}}

expired.title: Link expired
expired.text: This relay pack is no longer available. Ask the family for a new link.

errors.title: Pack unavailable
errors.notFound: This link is not valid. Check it or ask the family for a new one.
errors.network: Could not connect. Check the network and try again.

page.footer: This link is meant for the person taking over during the indicated period.
